info.title: Kryptor CLI
info.description: Command-Line Interface for Kryptor encryption engine.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Shows more detailed informations in console output [default: False]

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Prevents showing output in console. Only errors and crashes will be shown. [default: False]

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Disables showing messages with colors [default: False]

options.name: --debug-info
options.description: Show build information [default: False]

options.name: --random
options.description: Determines a random key generator to generate keystore in a non-deterministic method. [default: Unix]

options.name: --token
options.description: Determines the transformer token to generate keystore with a deterministic method

options.name: --size
options.description: Determines the keystore size. it's recommended to choose sizes larger than 256. This argument is not respected in transformer token generation because the token itself has a size argument.

options.name: --margin
options.description: Adds an extra small size to the generated keystore size. it could increase the security of the keystore. this option works in both random and token based generation.

options.name: --output
options.description: Determines the file name of the generated keystore. if no name is specified, the keystore's fingerprint will be used as file name.

options.name: --jobs
options.description: Determines the number of concurrent jobs

options.name: --keystore
options.description: Keystore file path or transformer token

commands.name: wordlist
commands.description: Queries the given word in installed wordlists

commands.name: query
commands.description: searches for the given word in the wordlists

options.name: --wordlist
options.description: The wordlist to do query. if not specified, all installed wordlists will be queried.

arguments.name: word
arguments.description: The word to query in wordlists

options.name: --optimize
options.description: Removes all duplicated entries from wordlists. Note: this process requires high amount of ram. if you recieve memory related exceptions, you must disable this option. [default: False]

options.name: --list
options.description: Lists all available wordlists [default: False]

options.name: --all
options.description: Installs all available wordlists [default: False]

options.name: --recommended
options.description: Installs all small-sized wordlists [default: False]

options.name: --optimize
options.description: Removes all duplicated entries from wordlists. Note: this process requires high amount of ram. if you recieve memory related exceptions, you must disable this option. [default: False]

arguments.name: wordlist
arguments.description: Id of wordlists to install, list of available wordlists could be found by --list option

options.name: --list
options.description: Lists all installed wordlists [default: False]

options.name: --all
options.description: Removes all installed wordlists [default: False]

arguments.name: wordlist
arguments.description: Id of wordlists to remove, list of all installed wordlists could be found by --list option

commands.name: import
commands.description: Compiles and imports given file as wordlist

options.name: --id
options.description: Determines the wordlist's unique id

options.name: --enforce
options.description: Determines enforcement status of the wordlist. if it's true, it will block any operations if the word is found in the wordlist, but if set to false, it just shows a warning [default: False]

options.name: --optimize
options.description: Removes all duplicated entries from wordlists. Note: this process requires high amount of ram. if you recieve memory related exceptions, you must disable this option. [default: False]

commands.name: keychain
commands.description: Gets informations about an encrypted file in a keychain file

arguments.name: keychain
arguments.description: Path of an existing keychain file or folder

commands.name: header
commands.description: Gets informations about an encrypted file

options.name: --block-size
options.description: Determines the block size for data processing [default: 32768]

options.name: --provider
options.description: Determines the crypto provider to process data [default: MixedVector]

options.name: --extra-parameters
options.description: Extra parameters to pass to the crypto provider, comma delimited

options.name: --continuous
options.description: Enables using the Continuous method [default: False]

options.name: --remove-hash
options.description: Removes the block hash to increase the security [default: False]

options.name: --dbp
options.description: Enables the Dynamic Block Processing [default: False]

options.name: --header
options.description: Determines the amount of data stored in the header. 0 means no data and 3 means all data needed to decrypt the file (except the keystore) [default: 2]

options.name: --keychain
options.description: Determines the key chain json file to store files unique identifiers and keystore information to it

options.name: --obfuscate
options.description: Obfuscates encrypted file name by renaming it to a random file name [default: False]

options.name: --output
options.description: The output directory. by default it points to the current directory. [default: <path>]

options.name: --keystore
options.description: Keystore file path or transformer token

arguments.name: files
arguments.description: Files or folders to be processed

options.name: --block-size
options.description: Determines the block size for data processing [default: 32768]

options.name: --provider
options.description: Determines the crypto provider to process data [default: MixedVector]

options.name: --extra-parameters
options.description: Extra parameters to pass to the crypto provider, comma delimited

options.name: --continuous
options.description: Enables using the Continuous method [default: False]

options.name: --remove-hash
options.description: Removes the block hash to increase the security [default: False]

options.name: --dbp
options.description: Enables the Dynamic Block Processing [default: False]

options.name: --output
options.description: The output directory. by default it points to the current directory. [default: <path>]

options.name: --keystore
options.description: Keystore file path or transformer token

arguments.name: files
arguments.description: Files or folders to be processed
